typography.headings: Manrope, sans-serif or default Tailwind system sans, heavily utilizing tracking-tight for modern look
typography.body: Inter, sans-serif or default Tailwind system sans
rules: Do not use generic sans for headings if variable fonts are available. If standard fonts must be used, rely on font-black or font-extrabold with tight letter spacing for impact.
Never center-align paragraphs; maintain left alignment for readability.

colors.primary: Orange (#f97316) for primary CTAs and active states
colors.background: White and Slate-50 to Slate-100 for subtle structural contrast
colors.text: Slate-900 for primary headings, Slate-500 for secondary body text

badges.dikkat: Amber (bg-amber-50 text-amber-700) - For warnings like over-ordering

layouts.overall: Mobile-first single column layout. Wrap the main content in a max-w-3xl or max-w-4xl container to prevent it from stretching too wide on desktop. No sidebars.
layouts.header: Left-aligned, large typography, with an inline delivery badge.
layouts.list: Vertical stack (flex-col) with gap-5 or gap-6. Generous spacing between product cards.
layouts.bottom_bar: Fixed to the bottom of the viewport, full width, backdrop blur, top border. Z-index 50.

visual_enhancers: Card Border Radius: Use rounded-[24px] or rounded-[28px] for product cards to match the plasiyer screen design system exactly.
Card Shadows: shadow-[0_16px_40px_-30px_rgba(15,23,42,0.4)] for resting, and shadow-[0_18px_45px_-28px_rgba(15,23,42,0.45)] on hover.
Use Lucide icons with soft rounded backgrounds (rounded-2xl) for product visuals.
Inner padding: p-5 or p-6 for cards to ensure they feel less dense and more consumer-friendly.
motion: Hover states on cards and buttons: transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
Smooth color transitions for buttons and quantity steppers: transition-colors duration-200
Backdrop blur on the sticky bottom summary bar: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80
instructions_to_main_agent: Redesign `DraftView.js` to be a mobile-first, single-column layout. Remove the 2-column `lg:grid-cols-3` layout.
HEADER: Title should be 'Sipariş Oluştur', Subtitle: 'Size özel önerilen ürünlerle hızlı sipariş verin'. Add next delivery day using `routeLabel` (e.g. 'Teslimat: Pazartesi').

PRODUCT CARD: Redesign to match the plasiyer `WarehouseDraftPage` style (large rounded corners like `rounded-[24px]`, specific soft shadows). Show product name, and small unit info. Remove depot stock, plasiyer stock, logistics info, and technical badges.
RECOMMENDATION BADGE: If `product.suggested_qty > 0`, show an 'Önerilen: X' badge highlighted in emerald/green. Include a short explanation below it: 'Son sipariş ve tüketim hızınıza göre önerildi'.

WARNING BADGES (Optional): If the user enters a quantity significantly higher than suggested (e.g., > suggested * 2), show a warning: 'Bu miktar ihtiyacınızdan fazla olabilir'. If a product is frequently bought (avg_daily > 5), show: 'Bu ürün hızlı tükeniyor'.

QUANTITY INPUT: Replace the current complex input with a cleaner stepper (+ / - / manual) similar to `DraftEnginePage`. Default value must be 0 (empty in UI). Use `suggested_qty` as a placeholder. The user MUST enter a value manually or via stepper. Do NOT allow submitting 0. Do not automatically add suggested_qty to the cart on submit unless explicitly set by the user.

BOTTOM STICKY BAR: Remove the right-hand order summary panel. Create a fixed bottom bar (`fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0`) showing `totalItems` (Toplam Koli), the number of unique items selected, and a primary button 'Siparişi Gözden Geçir'.
SUBMIT ACTION: The 'Siparişi Gözden Geçir' button should trigger the existing `handleSubmitOrder` function. Do not add new flows or modals, keep it triggering the existing API submission.
Keep all existing backend logic, API calls (`sfCustomerAPI`), and state management hooks (`useCountdown`, etc.) intact. Only adjust UI/UX.
accessibility: Ensure contrast ratio for text on badges is at least 4.5:1 (e.g., text-emerald-700 on bg-emerald-50 is generally safe).
Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements: inputs, buttons, product cards, bottom bar.
Inputs must have `aria-label` or related text context for screen readers.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do not make generic centered layouts. Use generous spacing (p-6, p-8) and keep text left-aligned.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky bars.
Do not apply `transition: all`. Use specific transitions like `transition-transform`, `transition-colors`.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based) to facilitate robust automated testing.
DO NOT use complete transparent background in header or overlays. Ensure content beneath is unreadable without a scrim or blur.
NEVER use emojis for icons where a Lucide icon fits better, unless specified by existing data mapping (like `getProductImage`).
